theme_and_archetype.reasoning: Aerospace enterprise domain demands Authority, Precision, and Clarity. A clean Light Theme base ensures readability, while heavy use of Deep Navy creates structural authority. The design should feel like a modern, highly precise engineering manual brought to life.

colors.primary_description: Deep Navy. Use for primary text, large structural headings, and footer backgrounds.
colors.accent_description: Sky Blue. Use for hover states, primary buttons, borders, and 'Tracing Beam' glows. Do not overuse.

headings.strategy: Industrial, precise, and authoritative. Must use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight) for large headers.

body.strategy: Clean and highly readable. Loose line height (leading-relaxed) to balance the dense headings.

spacing_and_layout.padding: Use p-8, p-12, p-16 for containers. Containers with borders must have internal padding.
spacing_and_layout.grids: Use Mode A (The 'Tetris' Grid) for the Solutions section to create asymmetry and visual tension. Never just use equal squares.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Optical Alignment over geometrical. Left-align paragraphs and dense content.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.hero_overlay: Maximum bg-black/40 or gradient-to-r from-[#1B2A4A]/90 to-[#1B2A4A]/30 for strong text contrast without killing the background image.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.solutions_cards: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). Use border-collapse style layouts with border-border/40 to expose the grid skeleton.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.navigation: Crystal Glassmorphism on scroll (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-white/20). MUST have visible nav links on desktop.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.footer: Massive Space (py-24). Deep Navy background (#1B2A4A) with Sky Blue (#4FC3F7) accents.

animations.global: Lenis for smooth scrolling (MANDATORY). Framer Motion for scroll-triggered staggered entrances.
animations.micro: Hover states must have explicit text color changes. Add slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-lg to cards on hover.
animations.decorative: Use the 'Tracing Beam' effect for high-priority solution cards or contact form borders.

image_urls.description: Aircraft Wing Mechanism - Use as hero section background with dark/navy gradient overlay for text readability.
Spacecraft Factory - Use for Industry 4.0 or overarching solutions visual.
Precision drill bits - Use for Tooling Solutions or Critical Tightening Applications.
Cluttered workshop - Use as a contrast for 'Specialized Tool Storage'.
Jet inside hangar - Use for Career page or About Us page header.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. STRUCTURE: Create a multi-page routing structure (Home, About Us, Careers) using React Router or equivalent. Ensure smooth navigation between them.

2. NAVBAR: Fixed 'Crystal Glass' header. Logo on the left, Navigation links (Home, Solutions, About Us, Careers) in the center, and a 'Contact Us' CTA button on the right (Sky Blue background, Deep Navy text).

3. HERO SECTION (Home): Use 'hero_background' image with a heavy Deep Navy to transparent gradient overlay. Headline: 'Precision Engineering. Aerospace Grade.' Tagline: 'Aerospace-compliant tooling, assembly, and Industry 4.0 solutions.' CTA: 'Explore Solutions'.

4. SOLUTIONS GRID (Home): Display the 6 solutions (Structural Assembly, Tooling, Industry 4.0, Critical Tightening, Crimping, Specialized Tool Storage) using the 'Tetris Grid' pattern. Not all cards should be the same size. Use 'Grid Borders' style.
5. CONTACT FORM (Home Footer): Minimalist friction. Fields: Name, Email, Phone, Message. Use Shadcn components. Style with a 'Tracing Beam' border effect to make it stand out.
6. ABOUT US PAGE: Must include sections for: Company Timeline (Founded 2020), Founder (Tejus Divakar), Values, Customers, and Partners.

7. LOGOS (Customers & Partners): Since external partner logos (Boeing, HAL, ISRO, FACOM, PROTO, etc.) are heavily protected and not in the image DB, DO NOT USE PLACEHOLDER IMAGES. Use pure typography. Example:
BOEING
. Style them uniformly in a scrolling marquee or CSS grid.
8. CAREERS PAGE: Emphasize 'Dynamic fast-paced work environment' and 'Modern problem solving for enterprise'. Include a prominent outbound CTA button linking to 'Naukri' for open positions.
9. TESTING: Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='contact-submit-btn', data-testid='nav-careers-link').
10. ICONS: Install and use 'lucide-react' or '@phosphor-icons/react' for all iconography (arrows, solution icons, contact details).
